pending_tasks.title: Phase 1 Integration Testing — E2E merchant flow

decisions.rationale: Platform spec
User direction
Hibernate 6.3+ native support
Prevents version/session conflicts
JaCoCo incompatible with Java 25
Single PG + Kafka container shared across test classes
Clean fallback pattern

decisions.decision: Temporal for S11 KYB, not for S13
decisions.rationale: S13 has no long-running workflows
GDPR; hash enables unique constraint + search
< 10ms p99 permission checks

decisions.decision: Namastack outbox replaces custom outbox for S13
decisions.rationale: Spring Boot 4 compatible
Small team sizes; in-memory invariant enforcement

decisions.decision: Namastack outbox for S11 (replacing custom outbox)
decisions.rationale: Consistency with S13/S10; Spring Boot 4 compatible
Consistent error format across all services
Required for POST/PATCH/DELETE; prevents duplicate operations
Testable without profile activation; explicit property-based feature toggling
MerchantScopeEnforcer validates principal-merchant binding
Refresh tokens validated against session state
Compliance service — consistent with MO/GW/IAM/FX prefixes
Rate history hypertable for time-series data; separate from main PostgreSQL
FX engine service — consistent with other service prefixes
Matches spec pipeline: KYC -> sanctions -> AML -> risk -> travel rule -> PASSED

decisions.decision: S2/S6 use VARCHAR+CHECK for enums (not PG enum types)
decisions.rationale: Simpler schema evolution; no ALTER TYPE needed when adding values

decisions.decision: Namastack outbox requires 3 tables (record, instance, partition)
decisions.rationale: V1 only had custom outbox_events table; V3 fixes to match Namastack schema

decisions.decision: JSONB assertions use contains() not equals()
decisions.rationale: PostgreSQL JSONB normalizes whitespace; exact string comparison fails

risks_blockers.description: Architecture review Finding #3: Live permission checks from S10 to S13 not yet implemented
Architecture review Finding #4: Idempotency is header-only, not true idempotent execution

next_actions: STA-97: S6 infrastructure persistence tests (includes outbox table fix)
STA-85: S2 sanctions screening infrastructure — ACL adapters
STA-98: S6 rate provider infrastructure — Refinitiv adapter + Redis cache
resume_snapshot: Phase 2 in progress. S2 persistence tests done (STA-84). S6 persistence tests next (STA-97).
S2: 173 tests (157 unit + 16 integration). V3 migration fixed Namastack outbox tables.
S6: 121 tests + persistence layer. Needs same outbox table fix as S2 V3.
Phase 1 intact: S11 (104), S13 (248), S10 (298). Grand total: 944 tests.
Next: STA-97 (S6 persistence tests). Then STA-85/STA-98 (external provider adapters).
